rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the three critical issues (vacuous IsUnipotent, k-only AlgPoints, tautological theorem); Review 2 more explicitly surfaces that the ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup classes are themselves semantically empty (True fields), while Review 1 uniquely catches the redundant extends-generated instance — these roughly cancel, and the remaining differences in Review 1 are minor or beyond reasonable scope.
